basic_details.job_title: NIT Mizoram Registrar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Mizoram (NIT Mizoram)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Mizoram (NIT Mizoram) has released the official Registrar Recruitment 2026 Notification under Advertisement No. NITMZ/R-1/NT/14/2026/1353. Educational qualification required is a Master's degree with at least 55% marks or an equivalent grade 'B' in the UGC 7-point scale from a recognized University/ Institute. The recruitment is being conducted to fill 1 Registrar post on a deputation basis with Pay Level 14 as per the 7th CPC. Eligible candidates up to 56 years of age can submit their applications via email on or before 10 August 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years as on 10-08-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with at least 55% Marks or its equivalent grade 'B' in the UGC 7 point scale from a recognized University/Institute.
qualification.details: Master's degree with at least 55% Marks or its equivalent grade 'B' in the UGC 7 point scale from a recognized University/Institute. Desirable: Qualification in area of Management / Engineering / Law. Experience in handling computerized administration / legal / financial / establishment matters.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 14 as per 7th CPC (PB-4: 37,400 – 67,000 with GP 10,000/-)
salary_details.details: Level 14 as per 7th CPC (PB-4: 37,400 – 67,000 with GP 10,000/-)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Mizoram Registrar Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Mizoram Registrar Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Mizoram Registrar Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Mizoram Registrar recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Mizoram Registrar position is 10th August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Registrar post?
faq.answer: A Master's degree with at least 55% Marks or its equivalent grade 'B' in the UGC 7 point scale from a recognized University/Institute is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Registrar position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Registrar post is 56 years as of the application deadline.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Registrar post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Registrar at NIT Mizoram.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Registrar post?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000 for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 500 for SC/ST candidates. PwBD and Women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Registrar position?
faq.answer: The salary is as per Level 14 of the 7th CPC, which includes a pay band of PB-4: 37,400 – 67,000 with a Grade Pay of 10,000/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Registrar recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Screening Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Registrar post at NIT Mizoram?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent via email with complete bio-data and required documents attached before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any desirable qualification for the Registrar post?
faq.answer: Yes, a qualification in Management, Engineering, or Law, along with experience in handling computerized administration, legal, financial, or establishment matters, is desirable.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
